Anmol Rastogi asking Richard to clarify ABMA-11245 SIM intake: which PS data metrics are needed. Owed specific metric list.

MX duplicate invoice $56K (PO Q1 MS-20200908). Google support ticket 0-1804000040849 open. Draft reply saved 4/28. 12d overdue.
AB Manage Spend Match agent on Agent Registry hit 85% match rate on 1,500-product file in <10 min. L3-L5 tooling signal.
